changeSet.author: custom
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO plugins ( identifier, name, description, javascriptModuleFile, functionsViewTemplate, settingsViewTemplate, namelocalizationkey, settingsPermission, functionsPermission, deviceFunctionsPermission, enabledForDevice ) VALUES ( 'devicelocation', 'Device Location', 'View GPS coordinates and location history for devices', 'app/components/plugins/devicelocation/devicelocation.module.js', 'app/components/plugins/devicelocation/views/devicelocation.html', NULL, 'plugin.devicelocation.localization.key.name', 'plugin_devicelocation_access', 'plugin_devicelocation_access', 'plugin_devicelocation_access', TRUE );

changeSet.author: custom
custom
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE plugin_devicelocation_latest ( id serial NOT NULL CONSTRAINT plugin_devicelocation_latest_pr_key PRIMARY KEY, customerId INT NOT NULL REFERENCES customers (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, deviceId INT NOT NULL UNIQUE REFERENCES devices (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, lat DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL, lon DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL, ts BIGINT NOT NULL, source VARCHAR(20) );

changeSet.author: custom
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE plugin_devicelocation_history ( id serial NOT NULL CONSTRAINT plugin_devicelocation_history_pr_key PRIMARY KEY, customerId INT NOT NULL REFERENCES customers (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, deviceId INT NOT NULL REFERENCES devices (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, lat DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL, lon DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL, ts BIGINT NOT NULL, source VARCHAR(20) ); CREATE INDEX plugin_devicelocation_history_device_ts_idx ON plugin_devicelocation_history (deviceId, ts DESC);
